title: Selenipedium × stenophyllum
taxonomy: Selenipedium × stenophyllum is a hybrid orchid species within the genus Selenipedium. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. The classification of Selenipedium × stenophyllum is further divided into the subfamily Cypripedioideae, which includes the Venus slipper orchids. This hybrid species is a result of the cross-breeding between two other Selenipedium species. Its classification is an essential aspect of its identification and study in the field of botany.
